pilot_signal_strength.evidence: Three decisive experiments: tightened hedging 6.2% strict (p=0.0004 vs control), activation patching 0/8 recovery, CMI rho=0.044 (null at pre-registered d'=10)

hypothesis_survival.evidence: H1 CONFIRMED, H3 CONFIRMED, H2/H4/H5/H6/H7/H8 FALSIFIED. 2 strong pillars survive. 5 falsified hypotheses strengthen negative-result narrative.

path_to_full_result.evidence: Gates 0 and 1 complete. Only Gate 2 (writing revision) remains. 13-item checklist specified. Zero GPU cost remaining.

novelty.evidence: Novelty score 8/10. Zero collisions on confound decomposition, metric audit, hedging dominance. Tightened hedging and activation patching null are first-of-kind results.

resource_efficiency.evidence: ~3 GPU-hours total consumed. Writing revision is zero-GPU. Exceptional cost-to-publication ratio.

hypothesis_survival.evidence: Untested. Novelty concerns from OrtSAE overlap.

path_to_full_result.evidence: Requires building from scratch. Would need supervised validation first.

novelty.evidence: Novelty score 5. Significant overlap with existing work.

hypothesis_survival.evidence: Untested. Original predictions. But faces same metric validity challenge.

path_to_full_result.evidence: Long path: must first solve metric validity, then develop measurement, then test.

resource_efficiency.evidence: Unknown GPU budget for co-occurrence matrix computation.

pilot_signal_strength.evidence: No experiments. CMI null result at L0=22 undermines theoretical foundation.

hypothesis_survival.evidence: CMI-absorption correlation falsified at pre-registered dimension. Foundation weakened.

path_to_full_result.evidence: Tang et al. (2025) unified theory risks subsuming contribution.

reasons: cand_metric_audit has 3 decisive new experiments (tightened hedging, activation patching, CMI replication) all producing clean results
Tightened hedging (6.2% strict vs 98.6% permissive, z=3.51, p=0.0004) resolves a 3-iteration blocking issue and requires major but strengthening narrative revision
Activation patching (0/8 parent recovery) provides the first metric-independent causal test confirming all-hedging narrative
CMI replication at L0=22 (rho=0.044, p=0.835 at pre-registered d'=10) cleanly falsifies the theoretical pillar but honest null reporting strengthens the paper
Control failure diagnosis mechanistically explains WHY the metric fails (23% of features match at cosine>=0.025 by chance)
Only writing revision (Gate 2, zero-GPU) remains -- clear path to completion
5 of 7 original hypotheses falsified -- strongest negative-result paper in the SAE absorption literature
All backup candidates have zero experimental evidence and face novelty or foundation concerns
next_actions: Execute Gate 2 writing revision incorporating all 5 new experimental results
Reframe hedging: 6.2% strict as primary, 98.6% permissive as upper bound, explain 92.3pp gap
Add activation patching table: 8 words, 0/8 recovery, confirm all-hedging narrative
Downgrade Section 6 to exploratory null result: CMI rho=0.044 at pre-registered d'=10
Add control failure diagnosis: cosine 0.025 matches 23% of features by chance in R^2304
Report partial correlation: rho=-0.328, permutation p=0.118 after controlling for probe F1
Name all 8 persistent core words: eight, liked, lower, offer, often, other, under, until
Update hypothesis status: H4 FALSIFIED, H8 FALSIFIED, H9 PARTIALLY SUPPORTED (strict 6.2% is real but far below permissive)
Compress Section 5.3, trim abstract to 220 words, add two-interpretation paragraph

tightened_hedging.narrative_impact: MAJOR_REVISION: 98.6% headline becomes 6.2% primary, 98.6% upper bound

activation_patching.conclusion: Zero causal evidence for competitive exclusion. All-hedging narrative confirmed.

cmi_replication_l0_22.conclusion: CMI-absorption correlation FALSIFIED at pre-registered dimension. The L0=82 signal (rho=-0.383) was driven by probe quality confound.

partial_correlation_cmi.conclusion: Association does not survive probe quality control

control_failure_diagnosis.conclusion: Cosine threshold 0.025 is structurally too permissive for 16k-feature SAEs in 2304-dimensional space

expected_score_trajectory.rationale: Three decisive new experiments resolve all blocking issues identified in 3 consecutive 6.5 reviews. Activation patching null + tightened hedging + CMI null together create a clean, falsification-rich negative-result paper. The task_plan.json predicted 7.5-8.0 for Gate 0 + Gate 1 completion.
